center.name: 肯迪布国家公园
center.summary: 肯迪布国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Greater striped swallow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The greater striped swallow (Cecropis cucullata) is a large swallow that is native to Africa south of the equator

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The greater striped swallow (Cecropis cucullata) is a large swallow that is native to Africa south of the equator
